mission.title: clickhouse: Local cache for remote filesystem (RFC)
mission.description: Local cache for remote filesystem (RFC). Requested by 18+ users.

steps.title: Check current clickhouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your clickhouse version and configuration:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
This feature requires a working clickhouse installation.

steps.title: Review clickhouse configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant clickhouse configuration:
A directory on local filesystem can be set up to hold a cache for remote filesystem up to specified size.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Local cache for remote filesystem (RFC)
steps.description:
Changelog category (leave one):
- New Feature

Changelog entry (a user-readable short description of the changes that goes to CHANGELOG.md):
- Local disk cache for data stored on S3-compatible storage

Detailed description / Documentation draft:
Issue #28961 
Local disk cache for data stored on S3-compatible storage
Settings in storage_configuration.disks.<disk_name>
- data_cache_enabled - true/false - turn on/off local cache for this disk
- data_cache_path - string - path for cache directory,

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Local cache for remote filesystem (RFC)" is functioning correctly.
